title: Binary search with index bounds postcondition
description: binary_search on a sorted list returns -1 or a valid index.
prompt: Write a Kodo module with a binary_search(lst: List<Int>, target: Int) -> Int function that ensures result >= -1. The list is assumed sorted. Print binary_search([1,3,5,7,9], 5) and binary_search([1,3,5,7,9], 4).
